Dialog.name: MND_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The Shadow dropped some sort[n]of object. I'm not sure what it is...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 52 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5001 0 0}Could you show that to me back at the dorm? I'd like to take a closer look.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 52 50 0 0}I'm not completely sure yet, but I get the feeling it might be useful.[n]{f 1 1}
